name: agentics
description: Mikey's personal collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: rca
plugins.description: Perform thorough root cause analysis on bugs and regressions — find the REAL underlying cause, not just the symptom

plugins.name: semver
plugins.description: Semantic versioning lifecycle management with auto-bump, changelog generation, and version-aware Claude Code hooks

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Unified idea-to-deployment pipeline — interrogation, research, design, planning, autonomous execution, review, validation, triage, documentation, and deployment

plugins.name: greenlight
plugins.description: Intelligent PreToolUse safety hook with deterministic command parsing, AI fallback, and permission mode awareness

plugins.name: freshen
plugins.description: Automatic context clearing via tmux — lets plugins trigger /clear and re-invocation between workflow phases

plugins.name: agents
plugins.description: Shared agent library — research-backed specialist agent definitions for cross-plugin use
